title: Harness Engineering Is AI’s New Gold Rush
summary: Harness engineering is an approach that augments AI models with supporting systems including tools, memory, context, permissions, verification, recovery paths, and feedback loops to make AI agents reliable and useful over time. It represents a shift from prompt engineering toward architectural choices around models that determine practical capability.
writeup: The video introduces harness engineering, an approach that shifts attention from prompt engineering to the system architecture surrounding AI models. It covers the components that make agents reliable over time: tools, memory, context management, permissions, verification, recovery paths, and feedback loops. The central argument is that as underlying model capabilities converge, companies differentiate by building runtime systems with safeguards and workflows around those models.
